'''âj-v-r''' ('''kajavar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vamoosh|vamoosh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vamoosh|vamoosh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-v-r
|-
! Lemma
| kajavar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijavar|thijavar]] || [[word:jijavar|jijavar]] || [[word:shijavar|shijavar]] || [[word:kijavar|kijavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujavar|thuthujavar]] || [[word:jujujavar|jujujavar]] || [[word:shushujavar|shushujavar]] || [[word:kukujavar|kukujavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujavar|thujavar]] || [[word:jujavar|jujavar]] || [[word:shujavar|shujavar]] || [[word:kujavar|kujavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujavar|thujavar]] || [[word:jujavar|jujavar]] || [[word:shujavar|shujavar]] || [[word:kujavar|kujavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejavar|thejavar]] || [[word:jejavar|jejavar]] || [[word:shejavar|shejavar]] || [[word:kejavar|kejavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojavar|thothojavar]] || [[word:jojojavar|jojojavar]] || [[word:shoshojavar|shoshojavar]] || [[word:kokojavar|kokojavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojavar|thojavar]] || [[word:jojavar|jojavar]] || [[word:shojavar|shojavar]] || [[word:kojavar|kojavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojavar|thojavar]] || [[word:jojavar|jojavar]] || [[word:shojavar|shojavar]] || [[word:kojavar|kojavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjavar|thĂŠjavar]] || [[word:jĂŠjavar|jĂŠjavar]] || [[word:shĂŠjavar|shĂŠjavar]] || [[word:kĂŠjavar|kĂŠjavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajavar|thathajavar]] || [[word:jajajavar|jajajavar]] || [[word:shashajavar|shashajavar]] || [[word:kakajavar|kakajavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajavar|thajavar]] || [[word:jajavar|jajavar]] || [[word:shajavar|shajavar]] || [[word:kajavar|kajavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajavar|thajavar]] || [[word:jajavar|jajavar]] || [[word:shajavar|shajavar]] || [[word:kajavar|kajavar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajavar|shajavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajavar|goshajavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajavar|gokishajavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajavarnĂŒ|shajavarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajavarnknĂŒ|goshajavarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavarnĂŒ|gokishajavarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajavarshĂ«|shajavarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajavarnkshĂ«|goshajavarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajavarshĂ«|gokishajavarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavaro|shajavaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavarnkro|goshajavarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavaro|gokishajavaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavarmu|shajavarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavarnkmu|goshajavarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavarmu|gokishajavarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajavarsher|shajavarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajavarnksher|goshajavarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajavarsher|gokishajavarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajavarng|shajavarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajavarnkng|goshajavarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajavarng|gokishajavarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajavarya|shajavarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajavarnkya|goshajavarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajavarya|gokishajavarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajavaryam|shajavaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajavarnkyam|goshajavarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajavaryam|gokishajavaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajavarnĂŒshĂ«|shajavarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajavarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajavarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajavarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajavarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavarnĂŒro|shajavarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavarnknĂŒro|goshajavarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavarnĂŒro|gokishajavarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavarnĂŒmu|shajavarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavarnknĂŒmu|goshajavarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavarnĂŒmu|gokishajavarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajavarshĂ«nĂŒ|shajavarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajavarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajavarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajavarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavarshĂ«ro|shajavarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavarnkshĂ«ro|goshajavarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavarshĂ«ro|gokishajavarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavarshĂ«mu|shajavarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavarnkshĂ«mu|goshajavarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavarshĂ«mu|gokishajavarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajavaronĂŒ|shajavaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajavarnkronĂŒ|goshajavarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavaronĂŒ|gokishajavaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajavaroshĂ«|shajavaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajavarnkroshĂ«|goshajavarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajavaroshĂ«|gokishajavaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavaromu|shajavaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavarnkromu|goshajavarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavaromu|gokishajavaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajavarmunĂŒ|shajavarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajavarnkmunĂŒ|goshajavarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavarmunĂŒ|gokishajavarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajavarmushĂ«|shajavarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajavarnkmushĂ«|goshajavarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajavarmushĂ«|gokishajavarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavarmuro|shajavarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavarnkmuro|goshajavarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavarmuro|gokishajavarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
